recap: Added worktree detection block in zshenv.zsh (string prefix check of $PWD vs $OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR) and new OROSHI_ZSH_AUTOLOAD derived var.
Renamed oroshi_path to oroshi-reload-path with optional [root] arg; removed auto-call+unfunction from path.zsh; added explicit call in zshenv.zsh; updated zshenv.bats stubs.

Renamed oroshi-reload-functions → oroshi-reload-fpath; replaced 'worktree' string hack with explicit [root] arg (derives configPath from root/tools/term/zsh/config); updated zshenv.zsh call site; deleted old file and tests; wrote new behavioral + scaffolding tests.
Added oroshi-chpwd.zsh in functions/ — detects new OROSHI_ROOT via string prefix check of $PWD, updates derived vars, calls oroshi-reload-path and oroshi-reload-fpath; registered in chpwd_functions.
